title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">🔥</font> Are we locking this in? 🎮📖</div
content:
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 5.4 – Expanded Settings with Character Boosts, Narrative Charge, Power Scaling, Weekly Item Drops, & Final Refinements


🚀 This version ensures dynamic player-character interaction with settings, introduces new thematic elements to each week, creates three-tiered item unlocks, and balances skill checks with narrative power scaling.

📜 1. Settings Now Provide Character-Specific Boosts

📜 Each week’s setting now has:
✔ A specific, historical “real-world” daytime location.
✔ A literary “dream/nighttime” location from that week’s readings.
✔ A “Characters You Might Find Here” section, giving specific archetypes a gameplay boost.

Example: Week 4 – Gothic Literature & the Subconscious
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 162 (chunk 162/555)
